intro: Your summer starts with the perfect bikini.
description:
Meet charming girls, each dreaming of completing their own collection of the most stylish and vibrant swimsuits! Your task is to help them find the missing pieces by matching threes of identical swimsuits in cozy puzzles. Instead of the usual fruit or candy, you'll find elegant summer swimsuits in a wide variety of colors, cuts, textures, and styles: from glamorous bikinis to elegant one-pieces.
Match threes, solve increasingly complex puzzles, and gradually unlock full, realistic images of the girls in these swimsuits. With each completed round, you gain access to new fragments, and then to complete portraits that you can not only store but also creatively decorate.
In the interactive gallery, you can move, zoom, and choose the perfect angle, combining open images with different backgrounds—from sunny beaches to tropical sunsets—to create your own unique composition. All this is accompanied by gentle, relaxing music, turning the game into a meditative ritual of beauty, summer mood, and attention to detail.

Features:
• Realistic images of girls in stylish swimsuits.
• Collect swimsuits in dozens of colors, styles, and designs—from minimalist to glamorous.
• Numerous backgrounds to personalize your favorite looks.
• Interactive gallery with zoom and layout options.
• Helpful bonuses and boosters for solving puzzles.
• Relaxing music creates an atmosphere of summer comfort and aesthetic pleasure.
• Gradually increasing puzzle difficulty—from simple combinations to real logical challenges.
